data.content: Branch: worktree-agent-session-runtime. Shared agent session runtime is implemented and adopted by terminal-manager initial/take-loop paths. Runtime centralizes capabilities, normalized event handling, AskUser auto-response, follow-up prompting, stdin close timing, watchdog timeout handling, and process-group termination across Claude, Codex, Gemini, Copilot, and OpenCode. Validation in /Users/cartine/foolery/.claude/worktrees/agent-session-runtime: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
